title: Capital readiness and risk-rail maintenance
body: Codex owns readiness briefs, allocator guardrails, tests, and command-center hygiene. Rerun capital readiness before sizing any new cash. No live submit; explicit user confirmation only.

title: Stabilize native TOS export evidence path
body: Claude owns thinkorswim native export stabilization and broker UI evidence collection. Codex consumes exported artifacts and tests downstream logic. Do not open a new TOS instance, change authority, or place trades.

title: Advance paper evidence bottleneck
body: Shared lane: convert approval-only candidates and shadow scenarios into scored paper evidence. Keep promotion gated on closed outcomes; no live authority expansion.
